creator: barzog@telecom.by
text:
After installing p5-Perl-Critic on first run it complains about mission Module::Pluggable which is available from devel/p5-Module-Pluggable

[gawriloff@new-hawk ~/svn/DeviceInfo/trunk]$ perlcritic DeviceInfo.pm
Exception::Fatal::Generic: A general problem was found.

Can't load Policies from namespace "Perl::Critic::Policy": Can't locate Module/Pluggable.pm in @INC (@INC contains: /usr/local/lib/perl5/5.8.8/BSDPAN /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.8/mach /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.8 /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl /usr/local/lib/perl5/5.8.8/mach /usr/local/lib/perl5/5.8.8 .) at /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.8/Perl/Critic/PolicyFactory.pm line 58.


Tue Jan 11 14:56:31 2011

Trace begun at /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.8/Perl/Critic/PolicyFactory.pm line 66
Perl::Critic::PolicyFactory::import('Perl::Critic::PolicyFactory') called at /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.8/Perl/Critic/Config.pm line 24
Perl::Critic::Config::BEGIN at /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.8/Perl/Critic/PolicyFactory.pm line 24

Perl::Critic::BEGIN at /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.8/Perl/Critic/PolicyFactory.pm line 24
eval {...} at /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.8/Perl/Critic/PolicyFactory.pm line 24
require Perl/Critic.pm at /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.8/Perl/Critic/Command.pm line 237
Perl::Critic::Command::_critique('HASH(0xbc3018)', 'DeviceInfo.pm') called at /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.8/Perl/Critic/Command.pm line 71
Perl::Critic::Command::run at /usr/local/bin/perlcritic line 30
BEGIN failed--compilation aborted at /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.8/Perl/Critic/Config.pm line 24.
Compilation failed in require at /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.8/Perl/Critic.pm line 24.
